title: Ender Dragon Sword
description:
you have seen that ender dragon can destroy blocks and kills every enderman?
Well let me tell you about Dragon Sword
Its Crafted with most powerful Items in Minecraft It Will Take Around 18 Withers 
And 24 Netherite Blocks And 6 Dragon Heads!
body:
# About Sword
This is by far the hardest sword to make in the game. btw this is my First Ever Mod :)
A Sword So Powerful that is made from so many rare Blocks and Items it can **It can one Shot anything Even Warden** does **1000 dmg** has **duribility of 12000**.
# how to craft
It will take you **3 nether stars** **4 blocks of netherite** **one ender dragon head** **blaze rod** to make **3 ingots** and you need **2 block of Dragon** to create Sword.
